title: NEST-GPU user_m2 skeleton vs CA1 project interpretation
core_claims: user_m2 is a NEST-GPU-provided user-model slot / registered CUDA model surface.
The CA1 project maps aglif_dend_cond_beta to user_m2.
The biological interpretation, receptor table, source-location transfer, and validation provenance are project-level layers.
The current user_m2 kernel contains soma/proximal/distal voltage states and per-port compartment tags.
Built-in aeif_cond_beta_multisynapse is multi-receptor but single-compartment; user_m2 is the reduced dendritic extension used here.
accuracy_constraints: Do not describe user_m2 as a fully built-in CA1 biological model.
Do not describe user_m2 as a model name invented only by the CA1 project.
Do not imply NESTML is the current NEST-GPU user model definition path.
Do not claim apical/basal full morphology is preserved exactly.
